Synopsis: Renames Mountainview Youth Correctional Facility as "William H. Fauver Youth Correctional Facility."

Renames "Physician Orders for Life-Sustaining Treatment Act" as "Practitioner Orders for Life-Sustaining Treatment Act"; permits physician assistants to sign and modify POLST forms; requires continuing education concerning end-of-life care.*
Revises and renames NJSTARS; repeals NJSTARS II; establishes NJ HonorScholars Program.
Makes various revisions to "Uniform Fraudulent Transfer Act"; renames act to "Uniform Voidable Transactions Act."
Renames county corrections officers as county correctional police officers.
Makes Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program Employment and Training Provider Demonstration Project permanent and renames program.
Makes Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program Employment and Training Provider Demonstration Project permanent and renames program.
Renames State's "Transgender Day of Remembrance" as "Babs Siperstein Transgender Day of Remembrance."
Renames joint meetings as regional service agencies; grandfathers existing joint meetings.

Renames "board of chosen freeholders" to "board of county commissioners" and "freeholder" and "chosen freeholder" to "county commissioner"; requires counties to update materials to reflect this title change.*
Revises and renames NJSTARS; repeals NJSTARS II; establishes NJ HonorScholars Program.

Renames "Physician Orders for Life-Sustaining Treatment Act" as "Practitioner Orders for Life-Sustaining Treatment Act"; permits physician assistants to sign and modify POLST forms; requires continuing education concerning end-of-life care.*
Renames "county vocational school districts" as "county career academies."
Renames county corrections officers as county correctional police officers.
Makes Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program Employment and Training Provider Demonstration Project permanent and renames program.
Renames State's "Transgender Day of Remembrance" as "Babs Siperstein Transgender Day of Remembrance."
Renames Mountainview Youth Correctional Facility as "William H. Fauver Youth Correctional Facility."
Renames joint meetings as regional service agencies; grandfathers existing joint meetings.
